policy: Explicit promotions only. Campaign evaluators never write this file.

calc_torque.known_limitations: Campaign A (high_rpm_dynamics) M3: Does not model friction or accessory loads.; SI torque at redline is not published peak torque.

calc_mean_piston_speed.known_limitations: Campaign A (high_rpm_dynamics) M3: Kinematic definition only.; Hard limit 26 m/s is an engineering standard, not a physics law.

calc_piston_acceleration.known_limitations: Campaign A (high_rpm_dynamics) M3: No OEM published peak piston acceleration in campaign dataset (null).; First-harmonic approximation.
